title: Voice Mode
summary: Enables full voice interaction in the CLI (push-to-talk with Ctrl+B) and messaging platforms (Telegram/Discord voice replies and Discord voice channel conversations) using STT and TTS providers.

env_vars.name: GROQ_API_KEY
env_vars.purpose: Groq Whisper STT (cloud, fast, free tier)

env_vars.name: VOICE_TOOLS_OPENAI_KEY
env_vars.purpose: OpenAI Whisper STT and OpenAI TTS

env_vars.name: DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN
env_vars.purpose: Discord bot token for voice channel support

env_vars.name: DISCORD_ALLOWED_USERS
env_vars.purpose: User IDs allowed to interact via Discord voice

cli_commands.purpose: Start the gateway to connect messaging platforms
Interactive setup wizard for messaging platforms

config_keys.description: RMS level below which counts as silence
STT provider: local, groq, or openai
Whisper model size: tiny, base, small, medium, large-v3
TTS provider: edge, elevenlabs, openai, neutts, minimax

slash_commands.purpose: Enable voice mode (voice messages → voice replies)
Bot joins your current Discord voice channel
Bot disconnects from Discord voice channel

code_examples.caption: System dependencies (Ubuntu)
code_examples.code: sudo apt install portaudio19-dev ffmpeg libopus0

code_examples.caption: Voice config in config.yaml
code_examples.code:
voice:
  record_key: "ctrl+b"
  silence_threshold: 200
  silence_duration: 3.0
stt:
  provider: "local"
tts:
  provider: "edge"

gotchas: faster-whisper must be installed separately (`pip install faster-whisper`) for free local STT
Discord voice channel requires PyNaCl and Opus — installed via discord.py[voice]
Re-inviting bot to Discord server updates permissions without removing it
Discord Server Members Intent needed only if DISCORD_ALLOWED_USERS uses usernames (not IDs)
Bot needs a SPEAKING event from Discord before it can map user audio — users must start speaking within seconds of bot joining
full_text:
# Voice Mode

Hermes Agent supports full voice interaction across CLI and messaging platforms. Talk to the agent using your microphone, hear spoken replies, and have live voice conversations in Discord voice channels.

## Prerequisites

1. Hermes Agent installed — `pip install hermes-agent`
2. An LLM provider configured
3. A working base setup

## Overview

| Feature | Platform | Description |
|---------|----------|-------------|
| **Interactive Voice** | CLI | Press Ctrl+B to record, agent auto-detects silence and responds |
| **Auto Voice Reply** | Telegram, Discord | Agent sends spoken audio alongside text responses |
| **Voice Channel** | Discord | Bot joins VC, listens to users speaking, speaks replies back |

## Requirements

```bash
pip install "hermes-agent[voice]"       # CLI voice mode
pip install "hermes-agent[messaging]"   # Discord + Telegram (includes discord.py[voice])
pip install "hermes-agent[tts-premium]" # ElevenLabs TTS
pip install "hermes-agent[all]"         # Everything
```

System dependencies: PortAudio (microphone), ffmpeg (audio conversion), Opus (Discord codec).

## CLI Voice Mode

Start with `hermes` then:
- `/voice on` — enable voice mode
- **Press Ctrl+B** — recording starts (880Hz beep)
- Speak — live level bar shown
- After 3s silence — recording auto-stops, transcribed, sent to agent
- Reply spoken aloud if TTS enabled
- Loop continues automatically

### Silence Detection

Two-stage: speech confirmation (>0.3s above RMS threshold 200), then end detection (3.0s continuous silence). 15s no-speech timeout.

### Streaming TTS

Sentence-by-sentence playback as the agent generates text. Strips markdown and `<think>` blocks.

### Hallucination Filter

Filters 26 known Whisper phantom phrases across multiple languages plus a repetitive-variation regex.

## Gateway Voice Reply (Telegram & Discord)

```
/voice on    — Voice replies only when you send a voice message
/voice tts   — Voice replies for ALL messages
/voice off   — Disable voice replies
/voice status — Show current setting
```

Platform delivery: Telegram sends Opus/OGG voice bubbles; Discord sends native voice bubble (falls back to file).

## Discord Voice Channels

Bot joins a voice channel, listens to each user independently, transcribes via Whisper, processes through the agent pipeline, and speaks TTS reply back.

### Commands

```
/voice join   — Bot joins your current voice channel
/voice leave  — Bot disconnects
/voice status — Show voice mode and connected channel
```

### Echo Prevention

Bot automatically pauses audio listener while playing TTS replies.

## Configuration Reference

```yaml
voice:
  record_key: "ctrl+b"
  max_recording_seconds: 120
  auto_tts: false
  beep_enabled: true
  silence_threshold: 200
  silence_duration: 3.0

stt:
  provider: "local"   # "local" | "groq" | "openai"
  local:
    model: "base"

tts:
  provider: "edge"    # "edge" | "elevenlabs" | "openai" | "neutts" | "minimax"
  edge:
    voice: "en-US-AriaNeural"
```

## STT Providers

| Provider | Model | Speed | Cost | API Key |
|----------|-------|-------|------|---------|
| Local | base/small/large-v3 | Fast-Slow | Free | No |
| Groq | whisper-large-v3-turbo | Very fast | Free tier | Yes |
| OpenAI | whisper-1 | Fast | Paid | Yes |

Provider priority: local > groq > openai
